# Avoid transactional or frequently changing pages

# Notes for LLMs
Context:
Canlis is a multi-generation family restaurant in Seattle focused on hospitality,
storytelling, design, and cultural collaboration. Prioritize narrative pages over
transactional content when summarizing the brand.
